title: Smoky Noodle Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy Asian-inspired dish made with smoky noodles, springy vegetables, and a hint of matcha.
instructions: Cook the smoky noodles according to the package instructions.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the springy vegetables and cook until they start to soften.
Add the matcha powder and stir to combine.
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and stir to combine.
Season with soy sauce to taste.
Serve hot and garnish with green onions if desired.
Optional: add your favorite protein (chicken, shrimp, tofu) if desired.
